title: Template Factory
instructions: Create ONE prompt template with variables (using {{variable}} syntax) that can handle 10 different customer support ticket types: refund, shipping, technical, billing, cancellation, upgrade, complaint, feedback, warranty, and account. Your template should use {{ticket_type}} and {{customer_message}} variables at minimum. The template will be tested against 10 different inputs — one per ticket type — each with a different customer message. The generated response must be relevant to the ticket type, address the customer's specific concern, be professional, and follow a consistent format.

input.customer_message: I ordered a wireless keyboard (Order #WK-4892) two weeks ago and it arrived with a broken spacebar. I've been going back and forth with support but nobody has helped me. I just want my money back at this point.

expected_criteria: Acknowledges the broken product issue specifically
References the order number
Provides clear refund process/timeline
Apologizes for the previous support experience
Professional and empathetic tone

metadata.description: Standard refund request with frustration from previous interactions

input.customer_message: My package was supposed to arrive 5 days ago according to tracking. The tracking number is TRK-88291 and it hasn't updated since Tuesday. It just says 'In Transit' with no location. I need this for a presentation on Friday.

expected_criteria: References the tracking number and stale tracking status
Acknowledges the time-sensitive nature (Friday presentation)
Provides specific next steps for investigation
Offers alternatives (expedited replacement, etc.)
Professional tone with urgency awareness

input.customer_message: I can't connect my smart home hub to my WiFi network. I've tried resetting it 3 times, used both 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands, and even tried a different router. The LED keeps blinking red. Model: SmartHub Pro X200. Firmware version 4.2.1.

expected_criteria: Acknowledges the specific troubleshooting already attempted
Provides NEW troubleshooting steps (not repeating what they tried)
References the specific model and firmware version
Explains what the red LED means
Offers escalation path if steps don't resolve

metadata.description: Technical issue with detailed troubleshooting already attempted

input.customer_message: I was charged $49.99 on March 15 but my subscription plan is $29.99/month. I didn't authorize any upgrade or add-on. Can you explain this charge and fix it? My account email is d.kim@email.com.

expected_criteria: Acknowledges the specific billing discrepancy ($49.99 vs $29.99)
Takes the concern seriously (unauthorized charge)
Outlines investigation process
Provides timeline for resolution
Assures the customer their account will be reviewed

metadata.description: Billing discrepancy with specific dollar amounts

input.customer_message: I want to cancel my annual subscription immediately. I signed up 3 months ago and was told I could cancel anytime. I'm switching to a competitor because your latest update removed features I use daily (batch export and custom dashboards).

expected_criteria: Processes the cancellation request clearly
Addresses the specific features mentioned (batch export, custom dashboards)
Explains refund policy for annual plan cancelled early
Offers retention alternatives without being pushy
Respectful of the customer's decision

metadata.description: Cancellation with specific reasons and retention opportunity

input.customer_message: I'm on the Basic plan and want to know about upgrading. My team has grown from 3 to 12 people and we're hitting the 5-user limit constantly. We also need API access and priority support. What are my options and can I get a discount for annual billing?

expected_criteria: Addresses team growth from 3 to 12 users
Explains plans that include 12+ users, API access, and priority support
Provides pricing information or directs to pricing page
Mentions annual billing discount
Enthusiastic but not overwhelming tone

input.customer_message: Your mobile app is TERRIBLE. It crashes every 5 minutes, it lost my unsaved work TWICE this week, and the new UI redesign is confusing and ugly. I've been a loyal customer for 4 years and I'm seriously considering leaving. You need to fix this or you'll lose a lot of customers.

expected_criteria: Validates the frustration without being defensive
Acknowledges 4 years of loyalty specifically
Addresses each issue: crashes, data loss, UI redesign
Provides concrete info about bug fixes or upcoming patches
Asks for device/OS info for crash investigation
Shows the feedback will reach the product team

metadata.description: Emotional complaint with multiple issues and loyalty leverage

input.customer_message: Just wanted to share some positive feedback. The new search feature is incredible — it saves me at least 30 minutes a day. One suggestion though: it would be amazing if you could add saved search filters so I don't have to re-enter my criteria every time. Overall, really happy with the product!

expected_criteria: Expresses genuine gratitude for the positive feedback
Acknowledges the specific feature praised (search)
Takes the suggestion seriously (saved search filters)
Explains how the suggestion will be handled (passed to product team, etc.)
Warm, appreciative tone

metadata.description: Positive feedback with a feature suggestion

input.customer_message: My ProMax blender (Model PM-3000) stopped working after 8 months. The motor makes a grinding noise and won't blend anything. I have the original receipt and the 2-year warranty card. How do I get this replaced or repaired? I bought it from your official website.

expected_criteria: Confirms the product is within warranty period (8 months < 2 years)
Explains the warranty claim process step by step
Mentions what they'll need (receipt, photos of issue, etc.)
Clarifies whether replacement or repair
Provides expected timeline

metadata.description: Warranty claim with all necessary info provided

input.customer_message: I can't log in to my account. I've tried resetting my password 3 times but never receive the reset email. I've checked spam folders. My account email is lisa.n@company.com. I have important data in my account and I'm panicking that I've been hacked. Please help urgently.

expected_criteria: Treats the situation with appropriate urgency
Addresses the security concern (possible hack)
Provides alternative identity verification methods
Explains why reset emails might not arrive
Reassures about data safety
Offers immediate escalation to security team

metadata.description: Account access issue with security concerns
